targetTranslation: in a state of loss (after لَفِى)
those who - points to specific people or things being described
ayahArabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
ayahEnglish: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

ayahArabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
ayahEnglish: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
